subcodes.title: Words at table to the friends, spoken on 1912-06-07
subcodes.first_line: Nothing in the world of existence is greater than such gatherings as these
subcodes.first_line_orig: در عالم وجود امری اعظم از اینگونه محافل نیست که محض محبت الله انعقاد گشته ملاحظه نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @importance of community building
